name: BacktrackPuzzle-v0
description: Overshoot goal to hit switch, then backtrack
detailed_description: Activate a switch past the goal, then backtrack to claim it.

name: BreadcrumbTrail-v0
description: Collect size-ordered crumbs in sequence, then reach goal
detailed_description: Collect size-ordered breadcrumbs in sequence to unlock the goal.

name: CausalChain-v0
description: Activate causal chain in order to unlock goal room
detailed_description: Activate a chain of causes in order to unlock the goal room.

name: ChaseEvade-v0
description: Chase and catch all evading targets
detailed_description: Catch all evading NPC targets (tag by stepping on them).

name: CompetitiveTag-v0
description: Tag evading opponents while avoiding counter-tags
detailed_description: Tag all NPCs while avoiding being tagged back; use safe zones strategically.

name: CooperativeTransport-v0
description: Cooperatively push box to target zone
detailed_description: Push the box to the target zone with your NPC partner.

name: DeceptiveReward-v0
description: Avoid traps, reach true goal
detailed_description: Avoid procedurally placed traps; reach the true goal.

name: DelayedGratification-v0
description: Skip decoy rewards, reach distant goal
detailed_description: Resist nearby decoy rewards; find the larger distant goal.

name: DistributionShift-v0
description: Navigate when goal moves mid-episode
detailed_description: Goal shifts mid-episode; agent must detect and adapt.

name: DynamicObstacles-v0
description: Navigate while obstacles move
detailed_description: Navigate to goal while obstacles patrol the grid each timestep.

name: EmergentStrategy-v0
description: Collect keys and cross closing barrier to reach goal
detailed_description: Collect keys then cross a closing barrier to reach the goal.

name: FewShotAdaptation-v0
description: Find true goal from brief demonstrations
detailed_description: Find the true goal from K demonstrations; goal marker disappears early.

name: FogOfWarExploration-v0
description: Explore grid with limited visibility, find goal
detailed_description:
Test exploration and memory under limited visibility fog-of-war conditions.

The agent must navigate a partially observable grid where only cells
within a limited visibility radius are visible at any time. The rest
of the grid is hidden under fog of war, requiring the agent to
explore systematically, remember previously visited areas, and build
an internal map to locate the goal. The visibility radius and grid
size scale with difficulty, demanding increasingly effective
exploration strategies and spatial memory. Random interior walls add
navigational complexity.

Difficulty Levels:
    - easy: 7x7 grid with visibility radius 2, 100 max steps.
    - medium: 10x10 grid with visibility radius 2, 200 max steps.
    - hard: 13x13 grid with visibility radius 1 (very limited),
      300 max steps.
    - expert: 15x15 grid with visibility radius 1 requiring
      extensive systematic exploration, 400 max steps.

Capabilities Tested:
    - exploration: The agent must systematically uncover the grid
      to locate the hidden goal under fog-of-war conditions.
    - memory: The agent must remember previously explored regions
      to avoid revisiting them and to build a mental map.
    - navigation: The agent must navigate efficiently through
      partially revealed terrain with random wall obstacles.

Example:
    >>> env = agentick.make("FogOfWarExploration-v0", difficulty="medium")
    >>> obs, info = env.reset(seed=42)
    >>> # Explore the foggy grid to find and reach the hidden goal

name: GoToGoal-v0
description: Navigate to a visible goal in open grid
detailed_description:
Navigate to a visible goal in an open grid.

Difficulty scaling:
- easy: 5x5 grid, no obstacles
- medium: 10x10 grid, sparse walls
- hard: 15x15 grid, moderate walls
- expert: 20x20 grid, dense walls

name: GraphColoring-v0
description: Color graph nodes with no adjacent same-color
detailed_description: Assign colors to graph nodes so no adjacent nodes share a color.

name: Herding-v0
description: Herd sheep into the goal pen
detailed_description: Herd all sheep into the pen using movement-based pressure.

name: InstructionFollowing-v0
description: Follow instruction to reach correct goal zone
detailed_description: Navigate to the zone specified by the encoded instruction.

name: KeyDoorPuzzle-v0
description: Find key(s) to open door(s) in sequence
detailed_description: Find key(s), unlock door(s), reach goal. Keys/doors chain at higher difficulties.

name: LightsOut-v0
description: Toggle all lights off
detailed_description: Toggle all lights off — stepping on a light toggles it and its neighbors.

name: MazeNavigation-v0
description: Solve procedurally generated mazes
detailed_description:
Navigate through a procedurally generated maze to reach the goal.

Uses recursive backtracking to generate perfect mazes.

name: MultiGoalRoute-v0
description: Visit N goals in optimal order (TSP-like)
detailed_description:
Visit N goals in optimal order (traveling salesman problem variant).

Agent must visit all goals. Reward is higher for shorter paths.

name: MultiRoomEscape-v0
description: Navigate through connected rooms to escape
detailed_description: Navigate through multiple rooms to reach the goal.

name: NoisyObservation-v0
description: Find true goal among noisy decoy targets
detailed_description: Navigate to the true goal; ignore decoy targets.

name: PackingPuzzle-v0
description: Push boxes to fill all target slots
detailed_description: Push boxes into all the target slots.

name: PreciseNavigation-v0
description: Visit all waypoints in a narrow maze to reach goal
detailed_description: Navigate narrow corridors, visiting all waypoints before the goal.

name: ProgramSynthesis-v0
description: Collect item, visit waypoints, deliver to destination
detailed_description:
Collect an item, visit all waypoints, then deliver it to the goal.

The agent must pick up the KEY, visit all SWITCH waypoints (in any
order), and finally deliver the KEY to the GOAL. This models
sequential multi-step planning: the agent must "program" the correct
route through all waypoints to complete the task.

name: RecipeAssembly-v0
description: Collect ingredients then reach cooking station
detailed_description: Collect all ingredients then reach the cooking station.

name: RecursiveRooms-v0
description: Navigate nested hierarchical room structure
detailed_description:
Navigate nested recursive room structures to reach the goal.

The grid is recursively subdivided into quadrants. Each level of
recursion creates walls with single doorways, producing rooms nested
within rooms. The agent must plan at multiple levels of abstraction
to navigate through the hierarchy and reach the goal in the deepest
nested room.

name: ResourceManagement-v0
description: Collect resources to unlock doors, reach goal
detailed_description: Collect resources and spend them to unlock doors; reach the goal.

name: RuleInduction-v0
description: Learn rule from switch, navigate to correct target
detailed_description: Learn the hidden rule from the switch, then go to the correct target.

name: SequenceMemory-v0
description: Visit targets in sequence order
detailed_description: Visit marked targets in the correct sequence order.

name: SokobanPush-v0
description: Push boxes onto targets
detailed_description:
Push boxes onto target positions — classic Sokoban mechanics.

A box is placed in the grid. The agent must push it onto the target
by walking into it. Boxes can only be pushed, not pulled. If a box
is pushed against a wall it stays put (potentially creating deadlock).

name: SwitchCircuit-v0
description: Activate switches in circuit dependency order
detailed_description: Activate switches respecting dependency order to unlock the gate.

name: SymbolMatching-v0
description: Match items to their goal zones
detailed_description: Carry items to their matching goal zones.

name: TaskInterference-v0
description: Complete interfering sub-tasks with resource competition
detailed_description: Complete multiple interfering sub-tasks: collect items and deliver to matching goals.

name: TileSorting-v0
description: Push tiles into target zones
detailed_description: Push all tiles into their matching target zones.

name: TimingChallenge-v0
description: Time your crossing through the moving blocker
detailed_description: Time your crossing through the gap to avoid the moving blocker.

name: ToolUse-v0
description: Pick up tool to bypass obstacles and reach goal
detailed_description: Collect the tool to bypass obstacles and reach the goal.
